investments.business_description: Corfin Holdings operates as Micross Components, a leading provider of high-reliability microelectronic components and services for the aerospace, defense, space, and medical industries. investments.end_customers: Fastener Distribution Holdings' primary end-customers are aerospace OEMs, aircraft MRO providers, defense contractors, and industrial manufacturers that require certified aerospace-grade fasteners, hardware, and precision components for aircraft assembly, maintenance, and defense systems production.

investments.business_description: Frontgrade Technologies is the largest independent supplier of radiation-hardened and high-reliability electronic components for space, defense, and critical infrastructure applications. investments.business_description: ENV Bidco is a Swedish acquisition vehicle for Envirotainer, the global leader in active temperature-controlled air cargo containers for pharmaceutical and life sciences logistics. The company is owned by EQT and Mubadala.
investments.end_customers: Envirotainer's primary end-customers are pharmaceutical companies, biotech firms, vaccine manufacturers, and specialty logistics providers that lease active temperature-controlled air cargo containers to maintain strict cold chain compliance (2-8C or 15-25C) when shipping drugs, vaccines, and biological products via air freight across 300+ airports globally.

investments.business_description: Axsome Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company developing and commercializing therapies for central nervous system (CNS) disorders. investments.end_customers: End customers are patients suffering from CNS disorders including major depressive disorder, narcolepsy, and Alzheimer's disease agitation. Products are prescribed by psychiatrists, neurologists, and primary care physicians and distributed through specialty and retail pharmacies.

investments.business_description: MannKind Corporation is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of inhaled therapeutic products using its proprietary Technosphere drug delivery platform. investments.end_customers: End customers are adult patients with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes who use Afrezza inhaled insulin as a mealtime insulin alternative to injectable insulin. Products are prescribed by endocrinologists and primary care physicians and dispensed through specialty pharmacies.

investments.end_customers: Fencing Supply Group's primary end-customers are professional fencing contractors and installers who purchase fencing materials, gates, and hardware for residential, commercial, and industrial fencing projects. investments.business_description: The Hiller Companies is a leading provider of fire protection and life safety services for clients operating high-consequence environments in the commercial, industrial, and marine sectors. investments.end_customers: Hiller's end customers are owners and operators of commercial buildings, industrial plants, oil and gas facilities, marine vessels, and data centers that must maintain code-compliant, operational fire protection systems. investments.business_description: SpecialtyCare is the leading U.S. provider of outsourced clinical services to hospital operating rooms, serving over 1,200 client hospitals across 46 states with a team of more than 1,500 highly trained clinicians performing over 500,000 procedures annually. The company's service lines include cardiovascular perfusion, ECMO (extracorporeal membrane oxygenation), intraoperative neuromonitoring (IONM), autologous transfusion services, sterile processing, endoscopic support, and surgical assistance. Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners acquired SpecialtyCare from Kohlberg & Company in October 2021 and classified it as an infrastructure-like asset due to its essential role in hospital operations.
investments.end_customers: SpecialtyCare's clients are hospitals and health systems that outsource specialized intraoperative clinical roles to avoid the cost and complexity of directly employing scarce subspecialist clinicians such as perfusionists and neuromonitoring technologists. Hospitals depend on SpecialtyCare's staffing and the SCOPE procedural data registry to maintain patient safety standards and access benchmarking insights across hundreds of thousands of surgical cases.

investments.business_description: Infostretch (now Apexon after rebranding in 2022) is a digital engineering services company that helps enterprises accelerate their digital transformation through quality engineering, AI/ML development, cloud services, and data analytics. The company provides end-to-end digital solutions from strategy through implementation.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are large enterprises in financial services, healthcare, retail, and technology that need digital engineering and quality assurance services. investments.business_description: Inovalon is a leading healthcare data analytics and cloud platform company whose Inovalon ONE Platform brings together national-scale connectivity, the nation's largest primary-source healthcare dataset (the MORE2 Registry, spanning 454 million unique lives and over 97 billion medical events), and advanced analytics. The company was taken private by Nordic Capital and Insight Partners in 2022.
investments.end_customers: Inovalon serves 15 of the top 15 U.S. health plans, all top 25 provider systems, leading specialty pharmacies, and 13 of the top 15 global pharmaceutical companies through over 50,000 active licensed customers. Its end-users are payer quality and risk adjustment teams, provider population health managers, pharmacy organizations, and life sciences commercial and real-world evidence teams.

investments.business_description: Park Place Technologies is a Cleveland, Ohio-based global leader in third-party data center hardware maintenance, providing post-warranty maintenance, support, and managed services for server, storage, and networking equipment from OEMs such as Dell, IBM, HPE, and Cisco. The company serves over 21,500 customers in 174 countries, offering 24/7 support with a First-Time Fix Guarantee, on-site engineers, and global parts stocking, typically at 30–40% savings versus OEM maintenance contracts. Park Place has expanded into infrastructure managed services, ITAD, and remote hands through organic growth and acquisitions.
investments.end_customers: End customers are large enterprise IT operations teams and data center managers at corporations, financial institutions, healthcare systems, and government agencies that run hybrid or legacy IT infrastructure and seek to reduce ongoing maintenance costs on hardware past OEM support windows. The value proposition is cost savings and service quality parity with OEM support, particularly for organizations running stable workloads on mature infrastructure.

investments.business_description: Cambrex is a leading contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) specializing in small molecule active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs) and advanced intermediates. The company provides drug substance development and manufacturing services across the entire drug lifecycle, from early-stage clinical development through commercial-scale production, operating multiple FDA-inspected facilities.
investments.end_customers: End customers are pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies that outsource the development and manufacturing of small molecule APIs and drug intermediates for both innovator and generic drugs across all therapeutic areas.

investments.business_description: Creek Parent is the holding company for Catalent, a global leader in contract development and manufacturing (CDMO) for the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and consumer health industries. Catalent provides advanced delivery technologies, development solutions, and manufacturing services for biologics, oral dosage forms, softgels, and gene therapies at facilities worldwide.
investments.end_customers: End customers are pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and consumer health companies that outsource drug formulation, development, clinical supply, and commercial manufacturing. Catalent supports products across all major dosage forms and therapeutic areas.

investments.business_description: Falcon Parent Holdings is the holding company for Advarra, a leading provider of regulatory compliance, institutional review board (IRB), and clinical trial technology solutions for the life sciences industry. Advarra received a major investment from Blackstone and CPP Investments, and provides IRB review, IBC services, research compliance consulting, and clinical trial software to accelerate drug development.
investments.end_customers: End customers are pharmaceutical companies, biotechnology firms, contract research organizations (CROs), and academic research institutions that require IRB review, regulatory compliance, and clinical trial management technology for their R&D programs.

investments.business_description: PAS Parent is the holding entity for Precision Medicine Group (PMG), a leading life sciences services company acquired by Blackstone for $2.3 billion in 2020. PMG provides integrated services spanning clinical development, specialty laboratories, commercial consulting, market access, and medical communications to support pharmaceutical and biotech companies in bringing precision medicines to market.
investments.end_customers: End customers are pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device companies that need clinical trial management, biomarker-driven R&D, regulatory consulting, commercial launch support, and medical communications services across the drug development lifecycle.

investments.end_customers: Consilium's primary end-customers are shipbuilders, ship owners, offshore oil and gas operators, and building owners that require fire and gas detection systems, navigation equipment (voyage data recorders, radar, speed logs), and environmental monitoring solutions for regulatory compliance and safety.

investments.business_description: Eagle Midstream Canada Finance is a financing entity for midstream oil and gas operations in Canada, supporting pipeline gathering, natural gas processing, and hydrocarbon transportation infrastructure in Western Canadian sedimentary basins. The company provides the capital structure for midstream assets that collect, process, and transport oil and natural gas from production wellheads to market.
investments.end_customers: The primary end-customers are upstream oil and gas producers in Western Canada that require midstream services including wellhead gathering, natural gas processing and fractionation, and pipeline transportation of crude oil, condensate, and natural gas liquids to downstream markets and export terminals.

investments.business_description: KKR Alberta Midstream Finance is a financing vehicle sponsored by KKR for midstream energy infrastructure assets in Alberta, Canada. The company supports natural gas gathering, processing, and transportation operations in Western Canada's prolific Montney and Duvernay formations, providing capital for pipelines, processing plants, and related midstream infrastructure.
investments.end_customers: The primary end-customers are upstream oil and gas exploration and production companies operating in Alberta and Western Canada that require midstream services including natural gas gathering, processing, fractionation, and transportation from wellhead to market.

investments.end_customers: Profile Products' primary end-customers are landscape contractors, sports turf managers (golf courses, athletic fields, stadiums), highway departments, erosion control contractors, and nursery/greenhouse operators who purchase soil amendments, erosion control blankets, and specialized growing media for construction, landscaping, and turf management projects.

investments.business_description: Gusto Sing Bidco is a Singapore-based acquisition vehicle associated with iNova Pharmaceuticals, a consumer healthcare company headquartered in Singapore that markets OTC brands across Asia-Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. Related entities (Gusto Aus Bidco) are registered at iNova Pharmaceuticals' address, and iNova completed the $540 million acquisition of Mundipharma's consumer healthcare brands (including BETADINE) in early 2024.
investments.end_customers: End customers are retail consumers and patients who purchase over-the-counter healthcare products including antiseptics (BETADINE), throat care (Difflam), cough remedies, skin care, and weight management products through pharmacies and retail channels across Asia-Pacific and other markets.

investments.business_description: Perseus Bidco US is the acquisition vehicle used by SERB Pharmaceuticals to acquire Y-mAbs Therapeutics for approximately $412 million in September 2025. SERB is a global specialty pharmaceutical company focused on emergency and rare disease medicines, and the Y-mAbs acquisition added Danyelza (naxitamab-gqgk), the first FDA-approved treatment for relapsed/refractory high-risk neuroblastoma.
investments.end_customers: End customers are patients with rare and emergency medical conditions, particularly pediatric oncology patients with high-risk neuroblastoma. Products are prescribed by oncologists and hematologists at specialty treatment centers and distributed through specialty pharmacies.

investments.end_customers: End customers are patients with emergency and rare medical conditions who require specialty pharmaceutical treatments, as well as hospitals, emergency departments, and specialty pharmacies that stock and administer SERB's products.

investments.business_description: Anaplan is a cloud-native connected planning platform that allows large enterprises to model and plan across finance, sales, supply chain, and HR functions on a single platform. Thoma Bravo took Anaplan private in June 2022 for approximately $10.7 billion. The platform uses a proprietary in-memory calculation engine (Hyperblock) that enables complex, enterprise-scale scenario modeling without the data movement and latency of traditional BI tools. Anaplan is headquartered in San Francisco.
investments.end_customers: Anaplan's customers are Fortune 500 and Global 2000 enterprises — particularly large finance, sales operations, and supply chain teams that need to synchronize planning across business units. investments.business_description: Auctane (formerly Stamps.com) is the world's leading e-commerce shipping software platform, acquired by Thoma Bravo in October 2021 for $6.6 billion. investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are CFOs, controllers, FP&A teams, and accounting departments at mid-market and large enterprises who need real-time financial reporting and analysis directly from their ERP systems. Finance professionals use insightsoftware to automate financial close, create management reports, and build budgets.

investments.business_description: Homecare Software Solutions, LLC operates as HHAeXchange, the only homecare software platform that seamlessly connects home care providers, state Medicaid programs, managed care organizations (MCOs), and caregivers through one unified system. The platform handles scheduling, billing, electronic visit verification (EVV), compliance, and clinical documentation.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are home healthcare agencies providing Medicaid-funded personal care, home health aide, and skilled nursing services. State Medicaid programs and managed care organizations also use the platform for EVV compliance monitoring. Caregivers interact with the system for clock-in/clock-out, scheduling, and care documentation.

investments.business_description: Icefall Parent, Inc. is the Vista Equity Partners acquisition vehicle that took EngageSmart private in January 2024 in a transaction valued at approximately $4.0 billion at $23.00 per share. EngageSmart is a vertically tailored customer engagement and integrated payments SaaS platform serving healthcare, government, utilities, and nonprofits through products including SimplePractice (behavioral health practice management), InvoiceCloud (government and utility bill payment), and DonorDrive (peer-to-peer fundraising).
investments.end_customers: Customers span multiple verticals: behavioral health practitioners use SimplePractice to manage appointments, billing, and telehealth; local government agencies and utilities use InvoiceCloud to accept electronic payments from residents; and nonprofits use DonorDrive to run online fundraising campaigns. In each case, the platform replaces manual, paper-based, or legacy billing workflows with integrated digital payment experiences.

investments.business_description: IQN Holding Corp. is the holding entity for Beeline (formerly IQNavigator / IQN), a leading vendor management system (VMS) and extended workforce management platform that helps large enterprises manage, source, and pay their contingent workforce including contractors, freelancers, and statement-of-work project labor. Beeline was formed through the 2016 merger of IQNavigator and Beeline, and New Mountain Capital acquired the combined company in 2018 from the Adecco Group. The platform provides sourcing, on-boarding, time and expense management, and analytics for non-employee labor.
investments.end_customers: Customers are large enterprises in financial services, technology, healthcare, and manufacturing that spend tens to hundreds of millions annually on contingent labor and need a centralized system of record to manage program compliance, spend visibility, and worker risk. Procurement and HR teams use Beeline to enforce preferred supplier lists, track contractor engagements, and maintain co-employment risk controls.

investments.business_description: IRI (now Circana, after merging with NPD Group in 2023) is the leading market research and consumer intelligence company for CPG, retail, and OTC health. The company integrates point-of-sale data, consumer panel data, media measurement, and AI-driven analytics to help clients understand and predict consumer behavior across physical and digital channels.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are CPG brand managers, category management teams, and retail merchandising executives at companies like Procter & Gamble, Unilever, Coca-Cola, and major grocery and mass-market retailers. These clients use Circana data for market share tracking, promotional effectiveness, new product launch analytics, and media ROI measurement.

investments.business_description: JS Parent, Inc. is the holding entity for Jama Software, a leading provider of requirements management and product development software. Jama Connect enables teams to define, align, and trace requirements across complex product development lifecycles, particularly in safety-critical and regulated industries. The company is backed by Insight Partners.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are product development, systems engineering, and quality assurance teams at organizations building complex products in automotive, aerospace & defense, medical devices, and industrial IoT. These teams use Jama to manage requirements traceability, ensure regulatory compliance (ISO 26262, DO-178C, IEC 62304), and coordinate across hardware and software development.

investments.business_description: LD Lower Holdings, Inc. is the holding entity for KLDiscovery (now Consilio after a 2024 merger), a global provider of e-discovery, digital forensics, and managed review services for litigation and regulatory matters. KLDiscovery's Nebula platform and Ontrack data recovery brand serve law firms, corporations, and government agencies worldwide.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are law firms, corporate legal departments, and government agencies that need to collect, process, review, and produce electronically stored information (ESI) for litigation, regulatory investigations, and compliance matters. Ontrack data recovery serves businesses and consumers needing to recover data from failed storage devices.

investments.business_description: LogicMonitor is a SaaS-based hybrid IT infrastructure monitoring and observability platform that provides unified visibility across on-premises, cloud, and container environments. The platform uses AI-powered anomaly detection and automated discovery to monitor networks, servers, applications, and cloud infrastructure.
investments.end_customers: Customers are enterprise IT operations teams and managed service providers (MSPs) that need unified monitoring across complex hybrid IT environments. Large enterprises and IT service providers use LogicMonitor to reduce alert noise and accelerate incident resolution.

investments.business_description: Magnesium BorrowerCo, Inc. is the financing entity within the corporate stack used by Permira to acquire Mimecast Limited in May 2022. Mimecast is a leading cybersecurity company providing cloud-based email security, archiving, and continuity solutions. The platform protects organizations against email-borne threats including phishing, ransomware, business email compromise, and data loss.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are IT security teams and email administrators at mid-market and large enterprises that need to protect their email infrastructure from sophisticated cyber threats. Organizations across all industries use Mimecast for inbound threat protection, data loss prevention, email archiving for compliance, and business continuity during email outages.

The company also operates the GasBuddy consumer app, which connects fuel retailers with price-conscious consumers.

investments.business_description: QBS Parent, Inc. is the holding entity for Quorum Software, a leading provider of enterprise software solutions for the oil and gas industry, backed by Francisco Partners (which agreed to acquire Quorum from Thoma Bravo in March 2025). Quorum Software's platform covers the full oil and gas operational and financial value chain, including production accounting, land and royalty management, revenue accounting, well lifecycle management, and joint interest billing (JIB), used by E&P operators, midstream companies, and oil field service providers. The company was formed from the merger of multiple energy software brands and serves thousands of users at hundreds of energy companies globally.
investments.end_customers: Quorum Software's customers are oil and gas exploration and production (E&P) companies, midstream pipeline and processing operators, and oil field service firms that need specialized accounting and operational software built for the unique requirements of the energy industry, including complex royalty calculations, regulatory reporting, and joint venture accounting. Accounting, land, and operations teams at energy companies use Quorum's platform as the system of record for production data, land agreements, and revenue distribution. The platform is particularly entrenched at mid-size independent E&P companies where switching costs are very high.

investments.business_description: Seven Bidco, SASU is the French acquisition vehicle for Septeo, a leading provider of software solutions for legal and real estate professionals in France. investments.business_description: Spaceship Purchaser, Inc. is the acquisition vehicle through which Permira took Squarespace, Inc. private in a $7.2 billion transaction completed in October 2024, using a two-step merger structure with Spaceship Group MergerCo as the merger subsidiary. Squarespace is a leading cloud-based website building, hosting, and e-commerce platform enabling businesses and individuals to create professional websites and online stores without coding, offering integrated tools for domain registration, e-commerce (payments, inventory, shipping), email marketing, scheduling, and analytics. The company serves millions of subscribers globally across creative industries, small businesses, and service providers who need a professional web presence.
investments.end_customers: Squarespace's customers are small businesses, freelancers, creative professionals (photographers, designers, musicians), and e-commerce entrepreneurs who need an all-in-one platform to establish and manage their online presence without technical expertise or the cost of custom web development. Pricing is subscription-based with tiered plans, and customers typically stay on the platform long-term as their website becomes a core part of their brand and business operations. The platform is particularly dominant among creative professionals and service businesses (restaurants, salons, fitness studios) seeking an aesthetically polished, easy-to-manage website.

investments.business_description: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety is a leading US fire protection, life safety, and security systems company founded in 1946, operating from over 124 locations nationwide. investments.business_description: The Hiller Companies is a leading provider of fire protection and life safety services for clients operating high-consequence environments in the commercial, industrial, and marine sectors. Founded in 1919 and acquired by Wind Point Partners from Littlejohn & Co. in January 2026 (Littlejohn had owned it since September 2022), Hiller operates through 45+ branch locations with 1,900+ employees providing testing and inspection, repair and maintenance, design and engineering, and complex installation and retrofitting of fire suppression, fire alarm, and life safety systems. Under Littlejohn's ownership, Hiller completed more than 20 add-on acquisitions to build national scale.
investments.end_customers: Hiller's end customers are owners and operators of commercial buildings, industrial plants, oil and gas facilities, marine vessels, and data centers that must maintain code-compliant, operational fire protection systems. investments.business_description: SpecialtyCare is the leading U.S. provider of outsourced clinical services to hospital operating rooms, serving over 1,200 client hospitals across 46 states with a team of more than 1,500 highly trained clinicians performing over 500,000 procedures annually. The company's service lines include cardiovascular perfusion, ECMO (extracorporeal membrane oxygenation), intraoperative neuromonitoring (IONM), autologous transfusion services, sterile processing, endoscopic support, and surgical assistance. Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners acquired SpecialtyCare from Kohlberg & Company in October 2021 and classified it as an infrastructure-like asset due to its essential role in hospital operations.
investments.end_customers: SpecialtyCare's clients are hospitals and health systems that outsource specialized intraoperative clinical roles to avoid the cost and complexity of directly employing scarce subspecialist clinicians such as perfusionists and neuromonitoring technologists. Hospitals depend on SpecialtyCare's staffing and the SCOPE procedural data registry to maintain patient safety standards and access benchmarking insights across hundreds of thousands of surgical cases.

investments.business_description: Color Intermediate, LLC is the holding structure above Color Health (formerly Color Genomics), a health technology company backed by Francisco Partners that operates as a population-scale genomic testing and cancer care delivery platform. Color provides hereditary cancer genetic testing (covering BRCA1/2 and 28 additional cancer-linked genes), and has more recently built a virtual oncologist-led cancer clinic serving employers, health plans, unions, and public sector populations. The company's CLIA-certified lab delivers tests at scale and at lower costs than traditional providers.
investments.end_customers: Color's primary clients are large employers, health plans, labor unions, and government health agencies that contract with Color to provide population-wide cancer screening, genetic testing, and cancer care navigation as an employee or member benefit. investments.end_customers: End customers are medical, dental, and specialty healthcare practices that need patient payment processing, billing automation, and engagement tools. investments.business_description: Netsmart Technologies is the largest health IT company exclusively focused on the human services and post-acute care markets in the United States, providing electronic health records (EHR), care coordination, data analytics, and revenue cycle management software to over 25,000 organizations serving 600,000+ clinicians in behavioral health, addiction treatment, social services, home health and hospice, and senior living settings. GI Partners made its initial investment in Netsmart in 2016 and TA Associates joined as a strategic minority investor in 2018 when they jointly acquired Allscripts' stake, giving GI Partners majority ownership. Netsmart's platforms support the clinical, billing, and reporting needs of organizations in markets that have historically been underserved by mainstream EHR vendors focused on acute care hospitals.
investments.end_customers: Netsmart's customers are community mental health centers, addiction treatment programs, social service agencies, home health agencies, hospices, and senior living operators that require specialized clinical documentation, care plan management, and billing software built for their specific clinical workflows, regulatory reporting requirements, and reimbursement models. The ultimate beneficiaries are the vulnerable patient populations — individuals with mental illness, substance use disorders, developmental disabilities, and post-acute care needs — whose care coordination is enabled by the platform.

investments.end_customers: End customers are post-acute care providers, home health agencies, hospice organizations, blood banks, rehabilitation facilities, and public health departments that use WellSky's integrated software platform for clinical documentation, billing, care coordination, and regulatory compliance.

investments.end_customers: End customers are hospitals and healthcare providers across the United States that outsource medical coding, clinical documentation auditing, cancer registry management, and compliance services to improve revenue cycle performance.

investments.business_description: Patriot Growth Insurance Services is a growth-focused national insurance brokerage platform founded in January 2019 by CEO Matt Gardner, a 30-year insurance distribution veteran, and backed initially by Summit Partners and subsequently recapitalized by GI Partners in September 2021. investments.business_description: Park Place Technologies is a Cleveland, Ohio-based global leader in third-party data center hardware maintenance, providing post-warranty maintenance, support, and managed services for server, storage, and networking equipment from OEMs such as Dell, IBM, HPE, and Cisco. The company serves over 21,500 customers in 174 countries, offering 24/7 support with a First-Time Fix Guarantee, on-site engineers, and global parts stocking, typically at 30–40% savings versus OEM maintenance contracts. Park Place has expanded into infrastructure managed services, ITAD, and remote hands through organic growth and acquisitions.
investments.end_customers: End customers are large enterprise IT operations teams and data center managers at corporations, financial institutions, healthcare systems, and government agencies that run hybrid or legacy IT infrastructure and seek to reduce ongoing maintenance costs on hardware past OEM support windows. The value proposition is cost savings and service quality parity with OEM support, particularly for organizations running stable workloads on mature infrastructure.

investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are television broadcasters, sports leagues, news organizations, and corporate media teams that need real-time graphics, virtual sets, video editing, and live production workflow tools. Vizrt's solutions are used by major broadcasters worldwide for on-air graphics, augmented reality, and studio automation.

investments.business_description: Connatix Buyer, Inc. is the holding entity for JWP Connatix (formed from the October 2024 merger of Connatix and JW Player), the industry's largest independent video technology platform. The combined company powers streaming for over 2,000 media companies including 80% of the top 25 Comscore US publishers, reaching over 1 billion unique users and delivering 30 billion+ monthly video plays.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are digital publishers seeking to deliver and monetize video content, and advertisers seeking premium video inventory with contextual targeting. Publisher groups use the platform for video hosting, playback, and programmatic monetization, while brands and agencies buy video ad placements across the network.

investments.business_description: Crewline Buyer, Inc. is the private equity acquisition vehicle for New Relic, a leading cloud-based observability platform. New Relic provides full-stack observability including application performance monitoring (APM), infrastructure monitoring, log management, browser monitoring, and synthetic monitoring. The company was taken private by Francisco Partners and TPG in 2023 for $6.5 billion.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are software engineering teams, DevOps engineers, and site reliability engineers (SREs) at technology companies and enterprises of all sizes. These teams use New Relic to monitor application performance, troubleshoot issues, and optimize the reliability and speed of their digital services and cloud infrastructure.

investments.business_description: Diligent Corporation is a SaaS company providing governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) software used by over 25,000 organizations globally, including 65% of Fortune 1000 companies. The platform includes board management portals, secure messaging, board composition and succession planning, ESG reporting, entity management, and enterprise risk management. Diligent is backed by Insight Partners.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are corporate boards of directors, general counsels, corporate secretaries, and compliance officers at public companies, private companies, nonprofits, and government organizations. These leaders use Diligent for board meeting management, secure communication, regulatory compliance, and governance benchmarking.

investments.business_description: Discovery Education is the worldwide leader in K-12 educational technology, providing a standards-aligned digital learning platform with over 200,000 curated resources including videos, audio, interactive activities, and lesson plans. The Discovery Education Experience (DEX) platform has been a trusted partner for school districts for over 24 years.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are K-12 school districts, teachers, curriculum directors, and instructional coaches that purchase the platform for classroom instruction. Discovery Education also serves librarians, EdTech specialists, and district administrators who deploy the platform to supplement core curriculum and improve student engagement across subjects.

investments.business_description: Everbridge is a global SaaS provider of critical event management (CEM) software that helps organizations anticipate, mitigate, respond to, and recover from critical events including natural disasters, IT outages, cyber attacks, and workplace safety incidents. The Everbridge 360 platform uses AI-powered risk intelligence and multi-channel mass notification (SMS, voice, email, mobile app).
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are enterprise security teams, IT operations centers, emergency management agencies, and business continuity professionals at over 6,500 organizations globally. Customers include corporate enterprises, hospitals, universities, government agencies, and critical infrastructure operators needing rapid communication during emergencies.

investments.business_description: Experity is the leading software platform for the urgent care industry, serving approximately 50% of U.S. urgent care centers with an integrated electronic health record (EHR), practice management, revenue cycle management, patient engagement, teleradiology, and business intelligence suite purpose-built for the urgent care setting. Formed through the merger of DocuTAP and Practice Velocity, Experity's complaint-driven EHR workflow allows clinicians to register patients in under two minutes and chart 90% of common visits in under 60 seconds. GTCR acquired a majority equity stake in Experity in March 2022 in partnership with founder and CEO Dr. David Stern.
investments.end_customers: Experity's customers are urgent care clinic operators—from independent single-site owners to large multi-site urgent care chains—that need an EHR and practice management platform optimized for high-volume, fast-throughput urgent care visits rather than a general-purpose system. Urgent care centers rely on Experity to drive operational efficiency, reduce documentation time, and optimize billing capture across the common acute care diagnoses that drive urgent care volume.

investments.business_description: Gigamon provides a 'Deep Observability Pipeline' — hardware and software platforms that tap, aggregate, filter, and intelligently route network traffic (packets, flows, and application metadata) from physical, virtual, and cloud environments to security and monitoring tools. The technology makes existing security information and event management (SIEM), intrusion detection, and observability tools up to 90% more efficient by eliminating irrelevant traffic and providing network-derived telemetry that MELT-based tools cannot capture. Elliott Management's private equity affiliate Evergreen Coast Capital took Gigamon private in 2017 for approximately $1.6 billion.
investments.end_customers: Gigamon's customers are large enterprises, government agencies, and cloud service providers with complex hybrid-cloud network environments where security and performance visibility at the network layer is essential. CISOs and network operations teams buy Gigamon to reduce blind spots in encrypted traffic, detect lateral movement by threat actors, and cut tool costs by eliminating redundant data feeds. Industries including financial services, healthcare, government, and telecommunications — where network security compliance requirements are strict — are core segments.

investments.business_description: Granicus is a cloud-based technology platform for government digital services, providing communications, website management, meeting and agenda management, records management, and digital forms and permitting software to nearly 4,500 federal, state, and local government agencies across the United States and internationally. The company connects over 200 million citizen subscribers to government information through its engagement cloud. Vista Equity Partners acquired a majority stake in 2016, with Harvest Partners later co-investing alongside Vista.
investments.end_customers: Granicus' customers are government agencies at the federal, state, county, and municipal level that use its platform to communicate regulatory notices, meeting agendas, and service updates to constituents, as well as to manage public records, accept permit applications, and automate administrative workflows. IT directors and communications teams at cities, counties, and state agencies rely on Granicus as mission-critical infrastructure for public transparency and citizen engagement mandated by open government laws. Long multi-year contracts and deep workflow integration create very high switching costs.

investments.business_description: GraphPad Software is the maker of Prism, the dominant statistical analysis and graphing platform purpose-built for life-science researchers. Prism combines biostatistics (t-tests, ANOVA, nonlinear regression, survival analysis, dose-response curves) with publication-ready graphing in a workflow designed for biologists rather than statisticians. Originally founded in 1989, GraphPad was acquired by Insight Partners in 2017 and subsequently merged into Dotmatics in 2021.
investments.end_customers: Prism is used by academic researchers, pharmaceutical and biotech scientists, and graduate students in biology, pharmacology, and clinical research at universities, research hospitals, and drug development companies worldwide. Labs and institutions purchase site licenses because Prism is widely accepted as the standard tool for producing figures and statistical outputs in peer-reviewed life-science publications.

investments.business_description: Homecare Software Solutions, LLC operates as HHAeXchange, the only homecare software platform that seamlessly connects home care providers, state Medicaid programs, managed care organizations (MCOs), and caregivers through one unified system. The platform handles scheduling, billing, electronic visit verification (EVV), compliance, and clinical documentation.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are home healthcare agencies providing Medicaid-funded personal care, home health aide, and skilled nursing services. State Medicaid programs and managed care organizations also use the platform for EVV compliance monitoring. Caregivers interact with the system for clock-in/clock-out, scheduling, and care documentation.

investments.business_description: Icefall Parent, Inc. is the Vista Equity Partners acquisition vehicle that took EngageSmart private in January 2024 in a transaction valued at approximately $4.0 billion at $23.00 per share. EngageSmart is a vertically tailored customer engagement and integrated payments SaaS platform serving healthcare, government, utilities, and nonprofits through products including SimplePractice (behavioral health practice management), InvoiceCloud (government and utility bill payment), and DonorDrive (peer-to-peer fundraising).
investments.end_customers: Customers span multiple verticals: behavioral health practitioners use SimplePractice to manage appointments, billing, and telehealth; local government agencies and utilities use InvoiceCloud to accept electronic payments from residents; and nonprofits use DonorDrive to run online fundraising campaigns. In each case, the platform replaces manual, paper-based, or legacy billing workflows with integrated digital payment experiences.

investments.business_description: IQN Holding Corp. is the holding entity for Beeline (formerly IQNavigator / IQN), a leading vendor management system (VMS) and extended workforce management platform that helps large enterprises manage, source, and pay their contingent workforce including contractors, freelancers, and statement-of-work project labor. Beeline was formed through the 2016 merger of IQNavigator and Beeline, and New Mountain Capital acquired the combined company in 2018 from the Adecco Group. The platform provides sourcing, on-boarding, time and expense management, and analytics for non-employee labor.
investments.end_customers: Customers are large enterprises in financial services, technology, healthcare, and manufacturing that spend tens to hundreds of millions annually on contingent labor and need a centralized system of record to manage program compliance, spend visibility, and worker risk. Procurement and HR teams use Beeline to enforce preferred supplier lists, track contractor engagements, and maintain co-employment risk controls.

investments.business_description: LD Lower Holdings, Inc. is the holding entity for KLDiscovery (now Consilio after a 2024 merger), a global provider of e-discovery, digital forensics, and managed review services for litigation and regulatory matters. KLDiscovery's Nebula platform and Ontrack data recovery brand serve law firms, corporations, and government agencies worldwide.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are law firms, corporate legal departments, and government agencies that need to collect, process, review, and produce electronically stored information (ESI) for litigation, regulatory investigations, and compliance matters. Ontrack data recovery serves businesses and consumers needing to recover data from failed storage devices.

investments.business_description: Magnesium BorrowerCo, Inc. is the financing entity within the corporate stack used by Permira to acquire Mimecast Limited in May 2022. Mimecast is a leading cybersecurity company providing cloud-based email security, archiving, and continuity solutions. The platform protects organizations against email-borne threats including phishing, ransomware, business email compromise, and data loss.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are IT security teams and email administrators at mid-market and large enterprises that need to protect their email infrastructure from sophisticated cyber threats. Organizations across all industries use Mimecast for inbound threat protection, data loss prevention, email archiving for compliance, and business continuity during email outages.

investments.business_description: Medallia is a cloud-based experience management platform that captures customer, employee, and operational feedback across every touchpoint (surveys, social, digital, IoT) and uses AI to surface actionable insights in real time. The company was taken private by Thoma Bravo in 2021 for $6.4 billion and serves over 1,000 enterprise clients.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are CX leaders, HR teams, and operations executives at large enterprises in hospitality, financial services, retail, telecom, and healthcare who need to measure and improve satisfaction across every interaction. These organizations use Medallia to drive loyalty, reduce churn, and improve NPS at scale.

investments.business_description: MRI Software is a leading provider of real estate software solutions covering the entire property lifecycle from investment management to property operations. Founded in 1971, MRI offers an open and connected platform for commercial, residential, social housing, and investment management real estate, serving clients in over 170 countries.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are commercial property managers, residential landlords, social housing providers, real estate investors, and REITs that need software for lease management, accounting, tenant screening, maintenance, and portfolio analytics. MRI also serves corporate real estate teams managing their own facilities and occupancy.

investments.business_description: NAVEX (formerly NAVEX Global) is the worldwide leader in governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) software, serving over 13,000 customers globally. The platform provides integrated solutions for ethics hotlines, whistleblower case management, policy management, third-party risk management, ESG reporting, and compliance training. NAVEX was owned by BC Partners and reported to be in a sale process.
investments.end_customers: The primary end customers are chief compliance officers, ethics officers, general counsels, and risk managers at mid-market and large enterprises across all industries. Regulated industries such as financial services, healthcare, energy, and manufacturing particularly rely on NAVEX for hotline reporting, anti-bribery compliance, and regulatory training programs.

investments.business_description: Optimizely (formerly Episerver) is a leading digital experience platform (DXP) providing integrated CMS, A/B and multivariate experimentation, content marketing, e-commerce, and customer data capabilities in a single SaaS platform. Originally founded in Sweden in 1994 as Episerver, the company acquired and rebranded around the Optimizely name after Insight Partners-backed Episerver purchased Optimizely in 2020. The combined platform serves enterprises globally and includes AI-powered personalization, omnichannel content management, and conversion rate optimization tools.
investments.end_customers: Optimizely's customers are mid-to-large enterprises across retail, financial services, media, healthcare, and technology that need to manage complex digital content at scale and run continuous product and marketing experiments. Marketers, product managers, and digital experience teams use the platform to improve conversion rates, personalize user journeys, and accelerate content publication. The company counts major global brands among its clients, who value the platform's ability to unify content management and experimentation in one workflow.

investments.business_description: PDI Technologies provides enterprise software, data analytics, and payment solutions purpose-built for the convenience retail and petroleum wholesale industries, covering ERP/back-office, logistics, point-of-sale, fuel pricing, and loyalty programs. The company also operates the GasBuddy consumer app, which connects fuel retailers with price-conscious consumers.
investments.end_customers: PDI serves over 1,500 companies and more than 200,000 convenience store and petroleum wholesale sites, with major customers including Pilot Flying J, Buc-ee's, and 7-Eleven. Its end-customers are convenience store chains, independent c-store operators, fuel distributors, and petroleum marketers who need to manage fuel logistics, retail operations, and consumer engagement.

investments.business_description: Ping Identity provides federated identity and access management (IAM) solutions including single sign-on, MFA, identity lifecycle management, and AI-powered threat detection. Acquired by Thoma Bravo and taken private in 2022.
investments.end_customers: Enterprises seeking modern IAM capabilities including identity verification, workforce access management, and API security across cloud and on-premises environments.
